codeReview.summary: The original feature failed because it only reran validators against commit 568e34d and did not implement the needed stabilization. The fix feature in commit 94f7496 adds poll-safe session bootstrap reads and updates the affected timer-page workspace-switch polls, which directly addresses the prior blocker without weakening the existing VAL-CROSS-001 List-view assertion or the formatter-clean requirement.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prior failed attempt shows the frontend-test-worker procedure was not enforced strongly enough: the worker returned success with no code changes even though the handoff itself documented a known `readSessionBootstrap` 500 flake that contradicted the feature's fix scope.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Prior handoff /Users/opentoggl-ci/.factory/missions/e037dfea-351f-4685-b798-ddaaec9dfb1c/handoffs/2026-03-25T04-00-55-268Z__tracking-timer-list-view-regression-and-format-fix__75ac3774-a168-417c-8772-6a7d245ed08b.json reports 'No code changes were required' while also recording transient `readSessionBootstrap` 500s; frontend-test-worker SKILL.md step 11 says rerun-only passes are not enough for flaky-fix features.

summary: Pass: the fix review confirms the original feature had not implemented the repair, and the later follow-up commit 94f7496 is the concrete code change that resolves the transient workspace-switch session-bootstrap failure behind the VAL-CROSS-001 List-view regression. The updated polling path preserves the existing timer-page assertions and leaves no new blocking code issues in scope.
